books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Hunt & Thomas
books.overview: The Pragmatic Programmer cuts through the increasing specialization and technicalities of modern software development to examine the core process--taking a requirement and producing working, maintainable code that delights its users.
reviews: A must read for every software developer.
Changed the way I think about coding.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.overview: Set on the desert planet Arrakis, Dune is the story of the boy Paul Atreides, heir to a noble family tasked with ruling an inhospitable world where the only thing of value is the 'spice' melange.
reviews: The greatest science fiction novel ever written.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.overview: No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving--every day. James Clear reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.
reviews: Incredibly practical and easy to apply.
A game changer for personal productivity.
